character.name: ant-digger
character.prompt: small chunky-cute worker ant, dark warm-brown body (#3a1f12), three body segments, six legs in tripod stance, oversized head with simple antennae, no crown. Wearing a chunky construction helmet integrated into the head silhouette — warm amber/cream helmet (#c88a3c/#ffd089) with brim pulled forward, helmet replaces the bare head outline and sits directly on the head. Body and proportions identical to worker-ant family.

dig.note: picking-up template used for lean-forward dig motion; 5 frames per direction
